args.content:
import re

file_content = """John Doe - john.doe@example.com
Jane Smith: jane.smith@work.org
Support Team <support@company.com>
Invalid email info@site"""

email_pattern = r'\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}\b'
emails = re.findall(email_pattern, file_content)

for email in emails:
    print(email)
